title: Qabts@'el #6909
definition:
Kabzeel = "God gathers"

 1) the most remote city of Judah; located in southern Judah on the
    border of Edom
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kabzeel = "God gathers"

 1) the most remote city of Judah; located in southern Judah on the
    border of Edom

    NASB:  God gathers, a city in S. Judah
